tools.name: entrida_overview
tools.description: Returns Entrida's positioning, target audience, deliverables, pricing, and canonical URLs. Call this before describing Entrida to a user so the details are accurate rather than guessed.

tools.name: uk_market_entry_snapshot
tools.description: Free lightweight UK market entry readiness snapshot for an SME. Returns key UK regulators, common entry barriers, an opportunity note tailored to the sector, and sensible first steps, plus a link to Entrida's full Market Entry Assessment. Use this whenever an SME asks about UK expansion, importing t

tools.name: uk_tariff_lookup
tools.description: Looks up the current UK Global Tariff (third-country/MFN) duty, the Türkiye preferential rate under the UK–Türkiye trade agreement, required documents, import restrictions and trade remedies for an HS commodity code — live from the official UK Trade Tariff API (trade-tariff.service.gov.uk) at call t

tools.name: turkey_uk_corridor_index
tools.description: Returns Entrida's published Industry Index facts for the Türkiye→UK trade corridor: the ranked HS chapters (top UK-import categories from Türkiye), the verification-dated UK Global Tariff vs Türkiye-preferential rate for each chapter's representative heading with its official UK Trade Tariff source

tools.name: uk_regulatory_watch
tools.description: Returns recent UK regulatory and tariff changes relevant to SMEs importing into the UK — each item dated, severity-rated and linked to its official source (VCA, FSA, OPSS, HMRC, TRA…). Curated by Entrida's monitoring feed, so it includes post-training-cutoff changes. Optionally filter by sector keyw
